settings.text: Foil side reflects radiant heat; white side creates a clean finished interior surface.
50-inch rolls are preferred for most cover and repair jobs when that width fits the project.
Pair with TermBars, white vapor barrier seam tape, and the right fasteners for the full system.
For full-building work, send photos and dimensions before ordering large quantities.

settings.heading: 2mm Pro
settings.text: Lean cover and repair layer for common retrofit projects.

settings.heading: 6mm Supreme
settings.text: Thicker foam layer for projects needing more body.

settings.heading: TermBar System
settings.text: Mechanical fastening keeps the surface tight.

settings.heading: Quote Support
settings.text: We can help size rolls, tape, and parts.

settings.heading: Cover and repair
settings.text: A practical fit when old metal building insulation needs a cleaner white finished interior.

settings.heading: Unclear layouts
settings.text: If framing, bay spacing, or product width is uncertain, send photos before ordering.

settings.heading: Tape and TermBars
settings.text: Most finished installs also need seam tape, TermBars, and fasteners.

settings.heading: Is This Right For Me?
settings.text: Use this roll when the goal is a clean BlueTex cover/repair system for a metal building.

settings.heading: Pro 2mm
settings.text: Lean, practical material for common cover and repair jobs.

settings.text: More foam thickness and body when the project calls for it.

settings.heading: Preferred width
settings.text: Use 50 inch material for most cover/repair runs when appropriate.

settings.heading: Use when needed
settings.text: Choose 62 inch only when the product and layout call for it.

settings.heading: Which Roll Should I Choose?
settings.text: Choose thickness and width based on the building layout. Send photos if you are unsure.

settings.heading: 48" Wide Aluminum Term Bars
settings.text: Fastens BlueTex tight to purlins and girts for the Cover/Repair System.

settings.heading: 3" White Vapor Barrier Seam Tape
settings.text: Seals panel seams on the white interior side.

settings.heading: Metal Screws & Locking Washers
settings.text: Useful for alternate fastening or smaller installs.

settings.heading: BlueTex™ Cover/Repair System Sample Box
settings.text: Test the full system before ordering for the building.

settings.heading: Complete the System
settings.text: Rolls usually need fastening and seam materials to become a complete BlueTex install.

settings.heading: Full description
settings.text: BlueTex roll products are used for metal building insulation cover and repair. The foil side handles radiant reflection and the white side creates a cleaner finished interior.

settings.heading: Specs and sizing
settings.text: Check the selected variant for exact width, roll size, coverage, and thickness. For full buildings, request a material list before ordering.

settings.heading: Install notes
settings.text: Most cover/repair installs pair rolls with TermBars, white vapor barrier seam tape, and compatible fasteners.

settings.heading: FAQ
settings.text: Use 50 inch material for many cover and repair jobs when available. Choose 62 inch only when the product and layout call for it.

settings.text: Specs, install notes, and common roll questions are available below.
